name: Local Service Business
description: A one-page site for a local service business (plumber, electrician, cleaner, etc.): hero, services, stats, a customer review, and a free-quote CTA.
prompt: Build a one-page site for a local <service> business: a nav, a hero with a kicker, headline, sub-line and a call-to-action, three service cards with real descriptions, headline stats (availability, years in business, rating), a customer review quote, and a final call to action to get a free quote.
